description: Typesense is an open-source search engine for full-text, vector, and hybrid search. It can be self-hosted or used through Typesense Cloud, and is designed for building search experiences over application data.
summary: Typesense exposes a documented REST/HTTP API for search and index management authenticated with a Typesense API key; no official GraphQL API, MCP server, OpenAPI spec, or first-party general-purpose CLI was found on typesense.org.
